code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut sorted = true
  mut i = 1
  mut prev = 0
  if n >= 1
    let first_tok = match tokens.get(0)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    prev = match string.parse_int(first_tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
  end
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let cur = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if cur < prev
      sorted = false
    end
    prev = cur
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
